speaker: speaker1
text: Jim ? Jim ? ... What are you doing in the kitchen ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Nothing , Mummy . I was hungry so I came here for some milk .

speaker: speaker1
text: Milk ? I thought you didn't like milk .

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't , but I couldn't find anything to eat in the refrigerator .

speaker: speaker1
text: Nonsense . There's lots of food in the refrigerator ... What's behind your back ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What are you hiding behind your back ? Let me see .

speaker: speaker2
text: Promise that you won't get angry .

speaker: speaker1
text: OK , I promise . What is it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , Jim . I told you . No pets . It'll make a mess of this house .

speaker: speaker2
text: Please , Mummy . Everybody else in my class keeps a pet . Please , I'll take care of it . It's a good kitty . It'll not bring you any trouble .

speaker: speaker1
text: No way . It might belong to somebody else . You can't keep it here .

speaker: speaker2
text: Please , Mummy . I found it this afternoon by the garbage bin . It was starving and looking for something to eat . Please ! You see , it's so cute and tame .

speaker: speaker1
text: All right . But you have to clean up everything it messes up .
